studionet.notes: 2026-07-16 resubmission. Fixes: (a) contract _now() no longer references non-existent gl.block.timestamp (old deploy crashed with AttributeError inside create_character); (b) frontend uses createAccount(privateKey) persisted in localStorage instead of window.ethereum, eliminating 'No account set' error; (c) global error boundary in app/error.tsx; (d) friendlier per-toast error mapping.

studionet_previous.notes: Broken: contract _now() referenced gl.block.timestamp which no longer exists on studionet genvm. create_character reverted with AttributeError. Kept for reference only — do not point live app at this address.
